title: Height Map of Tokyo 3
wikitext:
[]: Height Map of Tokyo-3             Quote Post by Zeak » Tue Jan 01, 2008 8:35 pm Has anybody stumbled across a high map of tokyo-3 as I would like to make a map for one of my games based around Evangelion. Regards Zeak

[]:             Quote Post by Mr. Tines » Wed Jan 02, 2008 2:20 am AFAIK, the best maps we have are here: http://www.evacommentary.org/supplemental-images.html#maps

[]:             Quote Post by Zeak » Wed Jan 02, 2008 2:48 am Thankyou exactly what i need

[]:             Quote Post by TheAyanamiOtaku » Sun Mar 09, 2008 5:59 pm me too. (rubs hands evilly)
